verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous evidence across all five domains. The linguistic identification of the Greek alphabet was the strongest anchor, supported by consistent regulatory (road markings), landscape (terrain), and meta (infrastructure) evidence. The judge correctly noted the elimination of alternative candidates like Cyprus and Albania.
